requirement_topic.en: Market Access — BSMD Conformity / Product Registration + In-Country Importer (MOIC)
requirement_topic.zh: 市场准入——BSMD符合性/产品注册 + 在地进口商（MOIC）
requirement_topic.zht: 市場准入——BSMD符合性/產品註冊 + 在地進口商（MOIC）

summary.en: Refrigerators placed on the Bahrain market must clear the conformity/registration system administered by the Bahrain Standards and Metrology Directorate (BSMD) under the Ministry of Industry and Commerce (MOIC). For regulated products such as household refrigerating appliances, the route typically involves: demonstrating conformity with the applicable GSO standards (safety GSO/IEC 60335-2-24, EMC GSO CISPR 14 series) and the GSO energy-efficiency MEPS/label requirements; compiling a conformity dossier (test reports, conformity certificate, technical documentation); and obtaining product registration/acceptance recognised by BSMD before importation and sale. Critically, the importer must be an established in-country (Bahraini) legal entity holding a valid commercial registration (CR) with MOIC; this importer is the responsible party that holds the conformity documentation, presents it to BSMD/customs, and is accountable for the product in the local market. Goods enter via Khalifa Bin Salman Port. A foreign manufacturer cannot place product on the Bahrain market without a local importer/registrant.
summary.zh: 投放巴林市场的电冰箱须通过由工商部（MOIC）下属巴林标准与计量局（BSMD）管理的符合性/注册体系。对于家用制冷器具等受监管产品，通常的路径包括：证明符合适用的GSO标准（安全GSO版IEC 60335-2-24、电磁兼容GSO版CISPR 14系列）及GSO能效MEPS/标识要求；编制符合性档案（检测报告、符合性证书、技术文件）；并在进口和销售前取得BSMD认可的产品注册/接受。关键在于，进口商须为在地（巴林）合法实体，持有MOIC核发的有效商业登记（CR）；该进口商为责任主体，持有符合性文件、向BSMD/海关提交，并对本地市场的产品负责。货物经哈利法·本·萨勒曼港（Khalifa Bin Salman Port）入境。外国制造商若无本地进口商/注册人，不能将产品投放巴林市场。
summary.zht: 投放巴林市場的電冰箱須通過由工商部（MOIC）下屬巴林標準與計量局（BSMD）管理的符合性/註冊體系。對於家用製冷器具等受監管產品，通常的路徑包括：證明符合適用的GSO標準（安全GSO版IEC 60335-2-24、電磁相容GSO版CISPR 14系列）及GSO能效MEPS/標識要求；編製符合性檔案（檢測報告、符合性證書、技術文件）；並在進口和銷售前取得BSMD認可的產品註冊/接受。關鍵在於，進口商須為在地（巴林）合法實體，持有MOIC核發的有效商業登記（CR）；該進口商為責任主體，持有符合性文件、向BSMD/海關提交，並對本地市場的產品負責。貨物經哈利法·本·薩勒曼港（Khalifa Bin Salman Port）入境。外國製造商若無本地進口商/註冊人，不能將產品投放巴林市場。

standards_or_laws: BSMD (Bahrain Standards and Metrology Directorate, MOIC) — conformity assessment and product registration/acceptance for regulated products
GSO standards adopted by Bahrain — safety (GSO/IEC 60335-2-24), EMC (GSO CISPR 14 series), energy-efficiency MEPS and labelling
MOIC commercial registration (CR) — requirement for an in-country importer/responsible entity
Bahrain Customs (via Khalifa Bin Salman Port) — import clearance against BSMD conformity

summary.en: In China, household refrigerating appliances require China Compulsory Certification (CCC) covering safety (GB 4706.13) and EMC (GB 4343.1), plus China Energy Label compliance (GB 12021.2), before sale. CCC is a mandatory third-party certification administered by CNCA-designated bodies; energy labelling is administered separately by NDRC/SAMR. The CCC holder is the domestic responsible party. These are all domestic Chinese mechanisms: a CCC certificate and a Chinese commercial registration confer no rights in Bahrain, and there is no Chinese-side obligation to appoint or use a Bahraini importer. The Bahrain market-access route (BSMD conformity + in-country importer with MOIC CR) must be built independently.
summary.zh: 在中国，家用制冷器具在销售前须取得涵盖安全（GB 4706.13）和电磁兼容（GB 4343.1）的中国强制认证（CCC），并符合中国能效标识（GB 12021.2）。CCC为强制性第三方认证，由CNCA指定机构审核；能效标识由NDRC/SAMR单独管理。CCC持有人为国内责任主体。上述均为中国国内机制：CCC证书及中国商业登记在巴林不产生任何权利，中国侧亦无委任或使用巴林进口商的义务。巴林市场准入路径（BSMD符合性 + 持MOIC商业登记的在地进口商）须独立建立。
summary.zht: 在中國，家用製冷器具在銷售前須取得涵蓋安全（GB 4706.13）和電磁相容（GB 4343.1）的中國強制認證（CCC），並符合中國能效標識（GB 12021.2）。CCC為強制性第三方認證，由CNCA指定機構審核；能效標識由NDRC/SAMR單獨管理。CCC持有人為國內責任主體。上述均為中國國內機制：CCC證書及中國商業登記在巴林不產生任何權利，中國側亦無委任或使用巴林進口商的義務。巴林市場准入路徑（BSMD符合性 + 持MOIC商業登記的在地進口商）須獨立建立。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — safety (GB 4706.13) + EMC (GB 4343.1); mandatory; administered by CNCA/SAMR
China Energy Label — Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR); based on GB 12021.2-2015

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers must build a complete Bahrain access package — CCC and the China Energy Label do not substitute for any Bahrain requirement: (1) BSMD conformity dossier — GSO-route test reports (safety, EMC) preferably from IECEE CB / ILAC MRA laboratories, plus a conformity certificate and technical documentation; (2) product registration/acceptance recognised by BSMD before importation; (3) GSO MEPS pass and a GSO Energy Efficiency Label (Arabic) — see the energy rows; (4) in-country importer — a Bahraini entity with a valid MOIC commercial registration that holds the documentation and acts as responsible party; without it the product cannot legally be imported or sold; (5) rating plate/instructions reflecting 230 V / 50 Hz and required Arabic content. Customs clearance at Khalifa Bin Salman Port is contingent on the BSMD conformity/registration being in order.
gap.zh: 中国制造商须建立完整的巴林准入文件包——CCC和中国能效标识均不能替代任何巴林要求：（1）BSMD符合性档案——GSO路径检测报告（安全、电磁兼容），宜由IECEE CB / ILAC MRA实验室出具，并附符合性证书及技术文件；（2）进口前取得BSMD认可的产品注册/接受；（3）通过GSO MEPS并取得GSO能效标签（阿拉伯文）——见能效行；（4）在地进口商——持有效MOIC商业登记的巴林实体，持有文件并作为责任主体；缺此产品不能合法进口或销售；（5）铭牌/说明书须体现230 V / 50 Hz及所需阿拉伯文内容。哈利法·本·萨勒曼港的清关取决于BSMD符合性/注册是否齐备。
gap.zht: 中國製造商須建立完整的巴林准入文件包——CCC和中國能效標識均不能替代任何巴林要求：（1）BSMD符合性檔案——GSO路徑檢測報告（安全、電磁相容），宜由IECEE CB / ILAC MRA實驗室出具，並附符合性證書及技術文件；（2）進口前取得BSMD認可的產品註冊/接受；（3）通過GSO MEPS並取得GSO能效標籤（阿拉伯文）——見能效行；（4）在地進口商——持有效MOIC商業登記的巴林實體，持有文件並作為責任主體；缺此產品不能合法進口或銷售；（5）銘牌/說明書須體現230 V / 50 Hz及所需阿拉伯文內容。哈利法·本·薩勒曼港的清關取決於BSMD符合性/註冊是否齊備。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — BSMD conformity/registration and an in-country importer (MOIC commercial registration) are required before importation and sale of refrigerators in Bahrain
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification (safety + EMC) + China Energy Label display required before sale in China

source.publisher: Bahrain Ministry of Industry and Commerce (MOIC) — Standards and Metrology Directorate (BSMD)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Bahrain market access for refrigerators requires BSMD conformity/registration (GSO standards basis) plus an in-country Bahraini importer holding a valid MOIC commercial registration and the conformity documentation. Chinese CCC and the China Energy Label do not substitute for any of these. Confirm the current BSMD registration scheme and importer requirements with a qualified Bahrain professional before shipment via Khalifa Bin Salman Port.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 电冰箱进入巴林市场须办理BSMD符合性/注册（以GSO标准为基础），并须有持有效MOIC商业登记及符合性文件的巴林在地进口商。中国CCC及中国能效标识均不能替代上述任一项。经哈利法·本·萨勒曼港出货前，请与合格的巴林专业人士核实现行BSMD注册方案及进口商要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 電冰箱進入巴林市場須辦理BSMD符合性/註冊（以GSO標準為基礎），並須有持有效MOIC商業登記及符合性文件的巴林在地進口商。中國CCC及中國能效標識均不能替代上述任一項。經哈利法·本·薩勒曼港出貨前，請與合格的巴林專業人士核實現行BSMD註冊方案及進口商要求。

requirement_topic.en: Radio Type Approval — Connected Refrigerators (Wi-Fi / Bluetooth) via TRA Bahrain
requirement_topic.zh: 无线电型号核准——联网电冰箱（Wi-Fi / 蓝牙）经巴林TRA
requirement_topic.zht: 無線電型號核准——聯網電冰箱（Wi-Fi / 藍牙）經巴林TRA

summary.en: Refrigerators with wireless connectivity (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, or other radio modules for smart-home features) require radio equipment type approval from the Telecommunications Regulatory Authority (TRA) of Bahrain in addition to the BSMD product conformity. The TRA regulates the placement and use of radio/telecom equipment in Bahrain: connected appliances must use approved frequency bands and power levels and must obtain TRA type approval (or registration) before importation and sale. The application is typically supported by radio test reports (commonly to ETSI/IEC standards as referenced by TRA), product specifications, and the manufacturer's radio module details, and is usually lodged by the in-country importer. Non-connected refrigerators (no radio module) do not require TRA approval and follow the BSMD conformity route only.
summary.zh: 带无线连接功能的电冰箱（Wi-Fi、蓝牙或其他用于智能家居功能的无线电模块）除BSMD产品符合性外，还须取得巴林电信监管局（TRA）的无线电设备型号核准。TRA监管巴林无线电/电信设备的投放与使用：联网器具须使用核准的频段与功率，并须在进口和销售前取得TRA型号核准（或注册）。申请通常以无线电检测报告（一般为TRA援引的ETSI/IEC标准）、产品规格及制造商无线电模块信息为支撑，并通常由在地进口商提交。非联网电冰箱（无无线电模块）无需TRA核准，仅走BSMD符合性路径。
summary.zht: 帶無線連接功能的電冰箱（Wi-Fi、藍牙或其他用於智慧家居功能的無線電模組）除BSMD產品符合性外，還須取得巴林電信監管局（TRA）的無線電設備型號核准。TRA監管巴林無線電/電信設備的投放與使用：聯網器具須使用核准的頻段與功率，並須在進口和銷售前取得TRA型號核准（或註冊）。申請通常以無線電檢測報告（一般為TRA援引的ETSI/IEC標準）、產品規格及製造商無線電模組資訊為支撐，並通常由在地進口商提交。非聯網電冰箱（無無線電模組）無需TRA核准，僅走BSMD符合性路徑。

standards_or_laws: TRA (Telecommunications Regulatory Authority) of Bahrain — radio/telecom equipment type approval and registration
TRA-referenced radio test standards (e.g., ETSI / IEC radio and short-range-device standards) — for Wi-Fi/Bluetooth modules
Bahrain Telecommunications Law and TRA equipment regulations — approved bands and power limits

summary.en: In China, wireless modules in appliances are regulated through the State Radio Regulation of China — products with radio transmitters require an SRRC (State Radio Regulatory Commission) type approval / radio transmission equipment approval, and CCC and NAL (Network Access License, where applicable) requirements may also apply. SRRC approval is a domestic Chinese authorization for use of radio spectrum within China; it confers no rights in Bahrain. A Chinese SRRC certificate is not accepted by the Bahrain TRA — separate TRA type approval is required for the radio module before a connected refrigerator can be imported and sold in Bahrain.
summary.zh: 在中国，器具中的无线模块通过国家无线电管理规定进行监管——含无线电发射器的产品须取得SRRC（国家无线电管理委员会）型号核准/无线电发射设备核准，必要时还可能适用CCC及NAL（进网许可证）要求。SRRC核准是在中国境内使用无线电频谱的国内授权，在巴林不产生任何权利。中国SRRC证书不被巴林TRA接受——联网电冰箱在巴林进口和销售前，须为其无线电模块单独取得TRA型号核准。
summary.zht: 在中國，器具中的無線模組通過國家無線電管理規定進行監管——含無線電發射器的產品須取得SRRC（國家無線電管理委員會）型號核准/無線電發射設備核准，必要時還可能適用CCC及NAL（進網許可證）要求。SRRC核准是在中國境內使用無線電頻譜的國內授權，在巴林不產生任何權利。中國SRRC證書不被巴林TRA接受——聯網電冰箱在巴林進口和銷售前，須為其無線電模組單獨取得TRA型號核准。

standards_or_laws: SRRC (State Radio Regulatory Commission) type approval — China radio transmission equipment authorization (domestic)
China CCC / NAL (Network Access License) — additional approvals applicable to certain radio/telecom equipment

gap.en: For connected refrigerators this is an additional, separate gate beyond BSMD product conformity: (1) the Wi-Fi/Bluetooth module must obtain Bahrain TRA type approval (or registration) before importation — a Chinese SRRC certificate is not accepted; (2) radio test reports referencing TRA-recognised standards (commonly ETSI/IEC) are needed, and the module's bands/power must fall within Bahrain-approved limits; (3) the application is normally filed by the in-country importer, who must also hold the BSMD product registration. Non-connected models avoid this gate entirely. Manufacturers should confirm at design stage whether a model variant includes a radio module, as this determines whether TRA approval is in scope.
gap.zh: 对于联网电冰箱，这是BSMD产品符合性之外的附加、独立门槛：（1）Wi-Fi/蓝牙模块须在进口前取得巴林TRA型号核准（或注册）——中国SRRC证书不被接受；（2）须提供援引TRA认可标准（一般为ETSI/IEC）的无线电检测报告，且模块频段/功率须落在巴林核准限值内；（3）申请通常由在地进口商提交，该进口商亦须持有BSMD产品注册。非联网型号完全无需此门槛。制造商应在设计阶段确认某型号变体是否含无线电模块，因为这决定是否涉及TRA核准。
gap.zht: 對於聯網電冰箱，這是BSMD產品符合性之外的附加、獨立門檻：（1）Wi-Fi/藍牙模組須在進口前取得巴林TRA型號核准（或註冊）——中國SRRC證書不被接受；（2）須提供援引TRA認可標準（一般為ETSI/IEC）的無線電檢測報告，且模組頻段/功率須落在巴林核准限值內；（3）申請通常由在地進口商提交，該進口商亦須持有BSMD產品註冊。非聯網型號完全無需此門檻。製造商應在設計階段確認某型號變體是否含無線電模組，因為這決定是否涉及TRA核准。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for connected models — TRA type approval/registration of the radio module required before importation and sale; not applicable to non-connected refrigerators
mandatory_status.cn: SRRC type approval is mandatory in China for radio-transmitting devices (domestic); does not satisfy Bahrain TRA requirements

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Connected refrigerators (Wi-Fi/Bluetooth) require Bahrain TRA radio type approval in addition to BSMD product conformity; non-connected models do not. A Chinese SRRC approval does not satisfy the TRA — separate TRA approval of the radio module, filed by the in-country importer, is required before importation. Confirm current TRA bands, power limits, and the application process with a qualified professional.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 联网电冰箱（Wi-Fi/蓝牙）除BSMD产品符合性外，还须取得巴林TRA无线电型号核准；非联网型号则无需。中国SRRC核准不满足TRA要求——须由在地进口商为无线电模块单独申请TRA核准方可进口。请与合格专业人士核实现行TRA频段、功率限值及申请流程。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 聯網電冰箱（Wi-Fi/藍牙）除BSMD產品符合性外，還須取得巴林TRA無線電型號核准；非聯網型號則無需。中國SRRC核准不滿足TRA要求——須由在地進口商為無線電模組單獨申請TRA核准方可進口。請與合格專業人士核實現行TRA頻段、功率限值及申請流程。
